legacy_quarantine.policy: Legacy findings are frozen by exact Git blob and are not approved. They may only remain unchanged or decrease. Any new unsafe finding or baseline-integrity failure is critical and fails closed.

informational_policy.cancel_in_progress_true: allowed and recommended for stale push-triggered work where a newer run supersedes the older run
informational_policy.job_scoped_contents_write: allowed only for jobs that persist validated generated artifacts through the shared safe persistence helpers
informational_policy.always_condition: allowed when used to preserve failure receipts or aggregate matrix-job outcomes truthfully

policy: Fail closed on every newly introduced direct git push/rebase, global write permission, deprecated action runtime, missing timeout, direct Contents API implementation, self-trigger write risk, or legacy-baseline integrity failure. The frozen legacy backlog remains visible and must be migrated down over time.
